page_subtitle: Every compound is held to the same standard: high purity, independent verification, and complete documentation on every order.

items.name: 99% HPLC Purity
items.description: Every compound is analyzed by High-Performance Liquid Chromatography and verified to a minimum of 99% purity before it is released. Purity is the single most important variable in peptide research, and we do not compromise on it.

items.name: Certificate of Analysis Included
items.description: A batch-matched certificate of analysis ships with every order. Match each vial to its COA to confirm identity, purity, and concentration, so you know exactly what is in every product before you begin your work.

items.name: Independent Third-Party Testing
items.description: Identity and purity are confirmed by independent laboratories, not just in-house. Third-party verification removes internal conflict of interest and gives you data you can trust and reproduce.

items.name: US-Based Fulfillment
items.description: Compounds are lyophilized and handled under strict quality controls, then shipped quickly and discreetly from within the United States. Free shipping on orders over $150.
